title: acalypha filiformis var. ovalifolia
intro: Acalypha filiformis var. ovalifolia is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the Narrow-leaved Acalypha. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Acalypha filiformis var. ovalifolia include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of various diseases. In traditional herbal practices, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes used as a paste or ointment to apply topically on affected areas.
